component.name: Silori
component.summary: Calm, fast screen capture for Linux

description.p: Silori is a lightweight screenshot tool focused on a calm capture flow, quick previewing, cropping, and simple on-image annotation.
Version 0.1 focuses on a reliable Linux desktop experience with a dock-style launcher, fast capture, preview editing, clipboard copy, and export to a user-selected save folder.

ul.li: Capture the desktop into a preview window
Add simple annotations such as shapes, text, highlights, and blur
Copy captures to the clipboard or save them as PNG or JPG

screenshot.caption: Main dock window for quick capture and settings access
Preview window with crop and annotation tools
